title: carduus acanthoides subsp. multiflorus
intro: Carduus acanthoides subsp. multiflorus, also known as the Spiny Plumeless Thistle, is a plant species in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Carduus acanthoides subsp. multiflorus include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antispasmodic to alleviate muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
